input_features.audio_text: One an easy and effective way to protect your skin from the sun while on the go. VT Cosmetics PDR & Essence Glow Sun Packed has got your back. The PDRN, which is extracted from wild ginseng, knows just the skin that is exposed to the sun, while the SPF50 Plus shields it from the harmful UV rays. It has a mild tone-up effect that not only provides sun protection, but also moisturizes your skin, giving it a brightening, dewy effect. I would recommend using it for when you have light makeup on and want to make your skin look effortlessly glowy. Since it's a compact, it's also super convenient to bring in everywhere and have a fresh layer of sun protection anytime, anywhere. So what are you waiting for? Get yours now from VT Cosmetics.
